name: climbx-mcp
description: MCP server for the ClimbX API (climbx.so): publish and schedule X posts, read analytics, voice profile, learnings, and outlier feeds.

scripts.build:bin: npm run build && esbuild dist/index.js --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);" --outfile=dist/index.mjs
scripts.bundle: npm run build:bin && npm prune --omit=dev && npx -y @anthropic-ai/mcpb pack . climbx-mcp.mcpb && npm ci
